challenges.title: Base64 Basics
challenges.desc:
Decode this Base64 string and enter the hidden word:

    SGVsbG9IYWNrZXI=

challenges.title: Hex Decoder
challenges.desc:
Decode this hex string (remove underscore first):

    6374667b6865785f6973_66756e7d

challenges.title: Caesar Cipher
challenges.desc:
Decrypt this ROT13 encoded text:

    UNPXRE
challenges.hint: ROT13 shifts each letter by 13 positions.

challenges.title: Port Knowledge
challenges.desc:
What is the default port number for HTTPS traffic?

  Enter only the number.
challenges.hint: HTTP is 80, HTTPS is HTTP but encrypted...

challenges.title: Subnet Math
challenges.desc:
Network: 192.168.1.0/24

  How many USABLE host IPs does it have?
  (Enter only the number)

challenges.title: OSI Layer
challenges.desc:
The Transport layer is which OSI layer number?

  (Enter only the number)
challenges.hint: Mnemonic: Please Do Not Throw Sausage Pizza Away

challenges.title: SQL Injection
challenges.desc:
Which payload bypasses a SQL login form?

  a) ' OR '1'='1
  b) <script>alert(1)</script>
  c) ; DROP TABLE users;
  d) ../../../etc/passwd

  Enter the letter only.
challenges.hint: This manipulates the WHERE clause to always be true.

challenges.title: XSS Type
challenges.desc:
Which XSS type is stored in the database and hits every visitor?

  a) Reflected XSS
  b) Stored XSS
  c) DOM XSS
  d) Blind XSS

  Enter the letter only.
challenges.hint: Think: which one 'persists' on the server?

challenges.title: HTTP Security Header
challenges.desc:
Which HTTP header prevents clickjacking by blocking
  the page from loading inside an iframe?

  Enter the exact header name.
challenges.hint: Starts with X- and contains the word 'Frame'.

challenges.title: File Permissions
challenges.desc:
What does 'chmod 777 file.txt' do?

  a) Makes the file read-only
  b) Full permissions to owner, group and others
  c) Deletes the file
  d) Encrypts the file

  Enter the letter only.

challenges.title: Find the Flag
challenges.desc:
What Linux command finds all files named 'flag.txt'
  starting from the root directory?

  Enter the exact command.
challenges.hint: Use the 'find' command with the -name option.

challenges.title: SUID Bit Hunt
challenges.desc:
What command lists all SUID bit files
  (common privilege escalation target)?

  Enter the exact command.

challenges.title: Nmap SYN Scan
challenges.desc:
Which Nmap flag performs a SYN stealth scan?

  Enter only the flag (e.g. -X)
challenges.hint: Most popular scan type. '-s' + first letter of 'Syn'.

challenges.title: Wireshark Filter
challenges.desc:
In Wireshark, what display filter shows only HTTP traffic?

  Enter the exact filter string.
challenges.hint: Just the protocol name in lowercase.

challenges.title: Burp Suite Tool
challenges.desc:
Which Burp Suite tool automatically crawls and scans
  a web app for vulnerabilities?

  Enter the tool name (one word).
challenges.hint: It's the automated component — not Repeater or Intruder.
